title: Creamy Irish Vermicelli Pasta
description: A comforting and creamy pasta dish inspired by Irish cuisine.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Gradually pour in the milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in the grated cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water and then drain the cooked vermicelli.
Add the cooked pasta to the cheese sauce and toss to combine, adding some reserved pasta water if needed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish, sprinkle with chopped parsley, and serve hot.
